name: Whipped Cornmeal & Okra
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the water to a gentle boil in a 3-quart saucepan.
2. Add the okra and cook for about 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Remove the okra using a slotted spoon and set aside.
4. Increase the heat under the saucepan so the water boils briskly.
5. Gradually add the cornmeal to the boiling water while continuously stirring to prevent lumps.
6. Stir in the salt and return the okra to the pan.
7. Cook, stirring for an additional 10 to 12 minutes until the mixture is thickened.
8. Remove from heat and add the butter one piece at a time, stirring after each addition.
9. Continue stirring until all the butter is incorporated and the dish has a light texture.
10. Adjust seasoning as needed and serve hot.
Serves 4.
